response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable polyglot engineer with genuine distributed systems experience, but the resume contains no evidence of the core competencies this Principal-level role demands: experimentation platform design, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, rollout-risk management, bias detection, or telemetry and metrics infrastructure at scale. His recent AI agent tooling work at re:cinq is directionally relevant but does not substitute for deep growth-measurement and experimentation platform expertise, and there is no signal of the cross-organizational technical leadership expected at IC6.
strengths: Polyglot engineer with hands-on production experience in multiple required languages (C++, JavaScript/TypeScript, C#, Java) across diverse domains
High-throughput distributed systems exposure at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second, demonstrating comfort with scale
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework contributions at re:cinq align with the role's emphasis on AI-first developer tooling
concerns: No experimentation platform experience anywhere in the resume — no mention of A/B testing frameworks, feature flags, experiment assignment, or rollout automation
No telemetry or metrics infrastructure background; owning telemetry foundations and unified growth measurement is a core responsibility of this role
Title and scope gap: current trajectory is Senior/Staff individual contributor with no evidence of multi-team technical leadership or growth-strategy ownership at Principal IC6 level

key_factors.factor: No telemetry or metrics infrastructure background
